description: Open-source AI-native marketplace framework built on MedusaJS v2. Provides blocks for seller management, commissions, payouts, order splitting, and vendor portals.
rules: Mercur extends MedusaJS v2 — do not confuse with Medusa v1 patterns.
Use the block-based CLI (mercurjs add) to install features, not npm packages.
Modules are resolved via MercurModules enum, not string service names.
Seller statuses are: pending_approval, open, suspended, terminated.
